channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Indian Billionaires Investing in Heritage Art: Cyrus Poonawalla’s Raja Ravi Varma Purchase
item.description: The NDTV report focuses on the growing interest of India’s ultra-wealthy individuals in acquiring fine art as a serious investment and symbol of cultural prestige. The article highlights the recent pu...

item.title: Call for Justice as Rights Group Exposes Rampant Impunity in Bicol Rape Cases
item.description: Women’s rights group Gabriela has called for stronger accountability and protection for survivors of gender-based violence in the Bicol region, as it raises concerns over a 'culture of impunity' that ...

item.title: Lisa Kudrow Reflects on Feeling Undervalued During Friends and Her Career Journey
item.description: Lisa Kudrow, renowned for her role as Phoebe Buffay on the iconic sitcom Friends, has shared her experiences of feeling overlooked during the show's peak from 1994 to 2004. In a recent interview with ...

item.title: PM urges Tanzanians to uphold peace and unity for economic growth
item.description: Prime Minister Dr. Mwigulu Nchemba has urged Tanzanians to prioritize peace and stability for their personal and national growth. Speaking at an Easter event in Dar es Salaam, he emphasized that peace...

item.title: Linux Kernel 7.1 to Phase Out i486 CPU Support
item.description: A patch authored by Ingo Molnar has been queued for the Linux 7.1 kernel, initiating the removal of support for Intel's i486 processor, first released in 1989. The change targets the M486, M486SX, and...

item.title: Kenya's Petroleum Sector Scandal: Politics and Corruption Intertwined
item.description: In Kenya, the recent arrests of three top energy sector executives—Energy and Petroleum PS Mohamed Liban, KPC CEO Joe Sang, and EPRA DG Daniel Kiptoo—during the Easter weekend have stirred debate on w...

item.title: Kenyan woman loses KSh 13 million due to financial mistakes abroad
item.description: Aladi Akoh, a digital creator, moved to the United States in search of better opportunities, but ended up losing over KSh 13 million due to poor financial choices. In an open video, Akoh shared her re...

item.title: Filipino Celebrities Celebrate Academic Milestones with Master’s Degrees
item.description: Several well-known Filipino personalities have recently marked a new chapter in their lives by successfully finishing their master’s degrees. Among them are boxing icon and former senator Manny Pacqui...

item.title: Met Police launches investigation after weapons and Taser kit are mislaid outside London mayor’s home
item.description: The Metropolitan Police has suffered a major security lapse after a bag containing police‑issued firearms, a Taser and ammunition was left on the street outside the London mayor Sir Sadiq Khan’s home ...

item.title: Husband of Kakamega Principal Denies Involvement in Her Death Amid Community Concerns
item.description: Tom Ambale, the husband of Carolyne Khamete, the slain principal of Kakamega County Polytechnic, has firmly denied any involvement in her death. Carolyne was reported missing and later found dead on M...

item.title: Iqraam Rayners Makes Strong Case for Bafana Bafana World Cup Squad
item.description: Iqraam Rayners, currently playing for Mamelodi Sundowns, is making a strong case for inclusion in South Africa’s Bafana Bafana squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Rayners netted his 11th goal of the Be...

item.title: Community-led solutions tackle KZN’s failing water infrastructure
item.description: KwaZulu-Natal is grappling with a severe water crisis that goes beyond scarcity. Much of the province’s water infrastructure, including dams, pipelines, and treatment plants, dates back to the 1960s-1...

item.title: Nigeria Women’s Cricket Team Wins Fifth NCF T20I Tournament
item.description: Di Nigeria women cricket team don once again shine as dem clinch di fifth Nigeria Invitational Women's T20I tournament, wey dem dey call di Patricia Kambarami Cup. Di final match wey happen for Tafawa...

item.title: Tensions escalate as Israel expands border operations and Trump targets Iran amid Australian criticism
item.description: The Australian Financial Review reports a sharp escalation in Middle East tensions as Israel widens its so-called 'security zone' in southern Lebanon while the United States intensifies threats agains...

item.title: NASA’s Artemis 2 astronauts return after historic lunar flyby
item.description: The crew of NASA’s Artemis 2 mission, which broke multiple space travel distance records, is heading back to Earth after completing a historic flyby of the moon. The Lockheed Martin-built Orion capsul...

item.title: Admissions Cards Delay Causes Stress Ahead of Matric Exams in Karachi
item.description: In Karachi, the matriculation examinations have been postponed by three days due to significant delays in the distribution of admit cards by the Board of Secondary Education Karachi (BSEK). The exams,...

item.title: Benzema Faces Growing Criticism Over Injuries and Absence at Al-Hilal
item.description: French striker Karim Benzema, currently playing for Al-Hilal in the Saudi Pro League, has drawn criticism from sports commentators despite missing his team's recent 2-2 draw against Al-Taawoun due to ...

item.title: Trump Criticises Australia and NATO as Iran Deadline Looms
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump continued his increasingly erratic rhetoric over the weekend, directing criticism towards Australia and NATO as a self-imposed deadline approaches for resolving the on...

item.title: Calgary condo prices and rents fall amid record-high supply levels
item.description: A surge in new housing developments across Calgary has driven down both condo prices and rental rates, according to the Calgary Real Estate Board (CREB). Chief economist Anne-Marie Lurie explained tha...

item.title: The Rise of Puzzle Games in Uncertain Times: A Mental Escape
item.description: In a world filled with chaos and uncertainty, puzzles have seen a surge in popularity. The pandemic catalysed a boom in puzzle games, with apps like Word Wheel and Tradle becoming daily rituals for ma...
